text.title: spec-requirements Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spec-requirements as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: AC that reuses the same "Then" clause for multiple scenarios: "Then the user sees a message".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Non-unique outcomes cannot be individually verified. Each AC must have a distinct, observable result.

failure-mode.description: Persona: "Power User" — goal: "use the product effectively".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No role, no pain points, no context. Cannot guide any design decision.

failure-mode.description: As a user, I want to log in, so that I can use the site.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No persona specificity, no measurable benefit clause. Cannot validate INVEST criteria.

failure-mode.description: FR-001: System should validate user input properly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "Should" is not mandatory, "properly" is ambiguous, no validation rules, no trace, no AC reference.

failure-mode.description: NFR-001: System should be fast and responsive.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No quantified target, no measurement conditions, not testable.

failure-mode.description: AC-001: When user submits valid data, then the system responds correctly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "Valid data" and "responds correctly" are placeholders. Cannot be executed as an automated test.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Does not name specific features. Scope creep prevention requires explicit item enumeration with reasoning.

failure-mode.description: Writing spec.md after design.md is already complete.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Back-filled requirements are never used for design decisions; traceability is fictional, not functional.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feature scope is too broad. Split into sub-features; large specs fragment agent context and human review.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Violates 60% Must cap. Forces MVP scope inflation. Re-classify ruthlessly.
